summary: Tested smart contact matching system - 11/11 backend tests PASSED, all frontend features verified. The find-or-create-and-log endpoint correctly handles phone matching (last 10 digits), email matching, name mismatch confirmation, and force_action options. Frontend Share Review, Congrats Card, Dialer, and Digital Card pages all work correctly with recipient fields.

minor.issue: email_work field not returned in response - Contact Pydantic model in models.py doesn't include email_work field. The field IS stored in MongoDB correctly, just not exposed in API response.

backend_create_new_contact.details: Creates new contact when no match found by phone or email

backend_find_by_last_10_digits.details: Finds existing contact by matching last 10 digits of phone number

backend_needs_confirmation_name_mismatch.details: Returns needs_confirmation=true with existing_name and provided_name when names don't match

backend_force_action_use_existing.details: Logs event on existing contact without creating new one

backend_force_action_update_name.details: Updates contact name to provided value

backend_force_action_create_new.details: Creates separate new contact even when match exists

backend_email_matching.details: Finds existing contact by email (personal or work)

backend_email_work_merge.details: Adds email_work when contact has different personal email (stored in MongoDB, not exposed in GET API)

backend_requires_phone_or_email.details: Returns 400 when neither phone nor email provided

frontend_share_review_modal.details: Modal has Name, Phone, Email fields and Text/Email share buttons

frontend_congrats_card_page.details: Has Customer Photo, Customer Name, Customer Phone, Custom Message fields and Create & Share button

frontend_dialer_page.details: Loads without errors with dial pad (1-9, *, 0, #), call button, and backspace

frontend_digital_card_page.details: Shows user profile, contact info, quick actions (Call, Text, Email, QR Code)

frontend_digital_card_share_modal.details: Share modal has Recipient Name, Phone, Email fields with multiple share options (Share Link, Copy Link, Via Text, Via Email, Save vCard, Show QR)

action_items: Add email_work field to Contact Pydantic model in /app/backend/models.py (lines 226-276) to expose it in GET API response
critical_code_review_comments: Contact model in models.py is missing email_work field - the find-or-create-and-log endpoint stores it in MongoDB but GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id} doesn't return it
seed_data_creation: Test contacts created during tests are automatically cleaned up by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart contact matching system is fully working. Backend endpoint at /api/contacts/{user_id}/find-or-create-and-log handles all contact matching scenarios. Frontend has recipient fields in Share Review modal (/more), Congrats Card (/settings/create-congrats), and Digital Card share modal (/card/{userId}). Dialer (/dialer) opens native tel: and logs calls. One minor issue: email_work field stored in MongoDB but not exposed in Contact API model.

mocked_apis_list: Twilio SMS is mocked (as noted in review_request)
